name: SoFi
description: SoFi (Social Finance) is a digital personal finance company and federally chartered bank offering an integrated suite of financial products including banking, personal loans, student loan refinancing, mortgages, investing, cryptocurrency trading, and credit cards.

itemListElement.name: SoFi Money Banking
itemListElement.description: Combined checking and savings account with high-yield APY up to 4.50% for SoFi Plus members, no-fee banking, and early paycheck access.

itemListElement.name: SoFi Personal Loans
itemListElement.description: Fixed-rate personal loans starting at 6.99% APR for qualified borrowers, loans from $5,000.

itemListElement.name: SoFi Student Loan Refinancing
itemListElement.description: Student loan refinancing with fixed rates from 3.99% APR with autopay and private student loans with no origination fees.

itemListElement.name: SoFi Mortgage
itemListElement.description: Home purchase loans, refinancing, HELOC, and home equity loans with SoFi Plus member discounts.

itemListElement.name: SoFi Invest
itemListElement.description: Active and automated investing in stocks, ETFs, fractional shares, IPOs, and cryptocurrency with IRA options.

itemListElement.name: SoFi Credit Card
itemListElement.description: Cash back rewards credit card with Smart Card offering 5% cash back at grocery stores and 10% boost for SoFi Plus members.

subOrganization.name: Galileo Financial Technologies
subOrganization.description: SoFi subsidiary providing fintech infrastructure and white-label banking APIs used by major fintech brands globally.
